$Comment: Boss CAE for the corrupted-Kweebec Warden, Phase 1. Cloned from the native CAE_Goblin_Duke_Phase_1 basic-attack evaluator (SelectBasicAttackTarget over the role's melee), then re-pointed at the Warden's spear melee var so the boss swings its leaf-spear like the Blight hunter rather than a goblin shield. Phase 1 is the opening: pure melee pressure while the survivors first engage. Ids renamed to the KweebecNightmare namespace; structure verbatim from the Goblin source.
